title: Ashen 16x Mod Compatibility [DEPRECATED]
description: Adds support to Ashen 16x for a variety of community mods. [DEPRECATED]
body:
[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)

![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)
___
# AS OF SEPTEMBER 04, 2024, THIS PACK IS NO LONGER ACTIVELY SUPPORTED.

# DUE TO THE INCREASINGLY LARGE COLLECTION OF MODS I INTEND TO SUPPORT, I'VE ELECTED TO SPLIT THIS MOD INTO SEPARATE, MODULAR ADD-ONS FOR EASE OF USE.

## All individual mods replacing this one can be found below:
- [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-advanced-netherite-support)
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-appleskin-support)
- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-better-end-support)
- [Dynamic Surroundings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-dynamic-surroundings-support)
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-eating-animation-support)
- [Eldritch End](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-eldritch-end-support)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-falling-leaves-support)
- [Globox_Z's Mods (LevelZ)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-globox_z-mods-support)
- [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-inmis-support)
- [Let's Do (Beachparty)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-lets-do-support)
- [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-no-tree-punching-support)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-regions-unexplored-support)
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-roughly-enough-items-support)
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-trinkets-support)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-visuality-support)

___
Do you play Minecraft with mods? Disappointed that those mods look out of place when you play with Ashen 16x? This Add-On can help! This pack adds support for a (slowly) growing list of community mods. Current mods supported:
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium) (limited support)
- [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)
- [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz)
- [PartyAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/partyaddon)
- [JobsAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobsaddon)
- [LibZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/libz)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) (limited support)
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
___
Have a request for a mod to be added to my to-do list? Drop me a line on Discord!
 
Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___
 
This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen).
